nodes.label: AI as engagement and compliance tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as a fun tool sometimes, too. Such as a reward, to make silly requests after they finish the session.

nodes.label: AI as collaborative client education enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: I can give them the 'typical' speech... But when I suggest that we see what AI has to say, we can be creative in how we ask, and they feel more involved

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.label_negative: AI as imperfect and potentially misleading
nodes.grounding_span: I still don't feel AI is perfect or right for every situation

nodes.label: Workplace-sanctioned AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My boss prefers that we use it at each session with our clients, more so to record interactions, and not as a reward, as I do.

nodes.label: AI as enhancer vs replacement
nodes.grounding_span: It is an enhancer for me and my clients.

nodes.label: Client engagement and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: I get almost 95% compliance, and it has been instrumental in getting clients back to their lives

nodes.label: Professional competence and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I felt I shouldn't need to use a computer program when I was trained to do my job using my own skills.

nodes.label: Client satisfaction and trust
nodes.grounding_span: they are more relaxed and usually I get praised for caring for them so well

nodes.label: Initial resistance to AI
nodes.grounding_span: When I first started using it, I hated it.

nodes.label: Positive discovery of AI's engagement potential
nodes.grounding_span: I really started liking some of the responses I was getting

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's perfection
nodes.grounding_span: I still don't feel AI is perfect or right for every situation

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: It is an enhancer for me and my clients.

nodes.label: Creative experimentation and playful adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I decided to try asking questions in different ways to help encourage a patient to understand more

nodes.label: Individualized client-centered tailoring
nodes.grounding_span: it is very individualized and random when and if I use AI
